description: cli-devin SWE 1.6 audited 17 non-system skill READMEs for em dashes, Section 1 tables, banned words/phrases, cross-skill coupling, and frontmatter drift; then autonomously remediated all 17 across 4 parallel waves plus a 3-skill cleanup wave covering audit false-negatives. All 17 READMEs end at em=0 and zero tables in Section 1.
